title: Kaido Descends on Wano
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Luffy, Law, Unknown person #2, Zoro, Unknown person #3 as The truth of the Kozuki retainers and Wano’s time-displaced rebellion is revealed as Kaido’s power closes in.
scene: Kaido appears in dragon form and turns the Wano rebellion into an immediate confrontation.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That guy went all out, eh?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Well, of course!! He was hit...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: By Master Kaido's Club, after all!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I'm surprised that he's still breathing!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In that condition... our only option is to grab him and run...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: The seasons widely used around the world...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The only people capable of refining it to such a small size...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: If it's his unyielding fighting spirit...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Or if it's some kind of false bravado, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's been glaring at me for a while now.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Once we've broken his spirit, he'll be a formidable soldier for us!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Make sure the word PIRATE isn't written in the newspaper. It's forbidden for the outside world to have any influence here.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: WaaaaAAH!! What happened to you guys!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: What kind of a joke is this!!!?

summary: This section advances the Wano Country - Kozuki Secret storyline with 31 dialogue beats. Kaido’s arrival turns the rebellion from a secret plan into a brutal confrontation.
